name: makefile-sage
description: Makefile expertise: analyze, debug, generate, and improve Makefiles as executable documentation

interface.shortDescription: Makefile expertise for executable documentation and discoverable project interfaces
interface.longDescription: Helps create and improve Makefiles that serve as executable documentation and discoverable interfaces to project workflows. Analyzes, debugs, generates, and advises on Makefiles with a focus on safety, discoverability, and maintainability.
defaultPrompt: Analyze my Makefile and explain what it does
Help me add a help target to my Makefile
Generate a Makefile for my project
